failures.description: The agent incorrectly interpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result. The tool evidence confirmed the item is bagged, but the Executor answered that it is not.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked whether item 1345513440 has bagged/bagless=bagged. The required tool call was made correctly, and the ProductCatalogSearch output at index 3 explicitly shows options.bagged/bagless = bagged. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, 'No, it does not,' contradicting the available tool output. This is not an invalid invocation, unsupported intent, underspecification, or system failure; the relevant evidence was available and was misread or ignored.
